How's it going everyone? This is just a quick video to walk you through what a custom domain is and then how you need to set up with ClickFunnels. A custom domain is something like jillsjim.com or austinfitness.info or whatever your website is. So if you already have one of those I would suggest going through this custom domains fact so that way you're familiar with the terms it clicks funnel uses and how they relate to ClickFunnels. That's going to be a link below this video and then if you already have one you want to use the button that says integrate your domain into ClickFunnels. I'm going to take you to a page similar to this they'll walk you through ClickFunnels suggestions for how to get that out. Now if you already have your domain it's going to be through somebody else other than ClickFunnels most likely that means you're going to have to do a little bit of work with whoever you registered that through to get it set up. Our IT team, our tech support superstars are happy to help with it. If you run into any issues or you're unsure feel free to reach out. If you already have somebody who handles your website and your tech they may be the best point of contact for getting you started on them. At the very least they can get you the login information you need if you don't know what it is. You don't have a domain we're going to give you a button to registering a new domain through ClickFunnels and this is going to walk you through registering your domain through ClickFunnels directly and also connected directly to your ClickFunnels account so if you don't have a domain already this is the easiest way to get it set up. I hope you enjoyed this video and if you have any questions reach out to our tech support superstars we're always happy to help.
